prompt: Create a polished vertical anime illustration of a cute teenage girl in an aquarium-themed plush shop, shown from the waist up in a close three-quarter view. She has long silvery ash-gray hair in a low side ponytail tied with one large navy bow, soft bangs framing her face, big sparkling blue eyes, flushed cheeks, and a small open surprised mouth as she looks lovingly at the plush she is holding. She is hugging exactly one oversized black-and-white orca plush toy with pink cheek blush and a tiny red eye; the plush is held diagonally across the left side of the image, with its tail and fins visible. Her outfit has exactly five main visible pieces: a white short-sleeve blouse, a navy sleeveless pinafore-style top, three small gold bow decorations on the front, a gray skirt, and a small beige crossbody bag with thin straps and a clasp resting at her hip. Add exactly two small white hand-drawn heart doodles near her head to show affection. The background is softly blurred and dreamy, filled with pale blue aquarium-shop shelves and rounded sea-creature plushies, with gentle bokeh, pastel blue lighting, and a cozy aquatic atmosphere. Use a high-quality Japanese anime art style with delicate linework, glossy eyes, soft cel shading, subtle fabric folds, warm skin tones, and a bright cute mood. Include a small white artist-handle watermark near the bottom-left reading @minori_chigusa  無断使用NG. Keep the composition vertical 2:3, no extra characters, no additional readable text, and emphasize the girl's affectionate expression toward the orca plush.

promptZh: 创作一张精致的竖版动漫插画，主角为 一位可爱的少女，场景设定在水族馆主题的毛绒玩具店中，采用半身近景四分之三侧面视角。她留着长长的 银灰发色 头发，扎成低侧马尾，系着一个大大的海军蓝蝴蝶结，柔顺的刘海修饰着脸庞，拥有闪闪发光的蓝色大眼睛、红润的脸颊，微张的小嘴流露出惊讶的神情，深情地注视着怀中的毛绒玩具。她正紧紧抱着一个巨大的黑白虎鲸毛绒玩具，虎鲸脸颊带有粉色腮红，眼睛为红色小圆点；虎鲸斜抱在画面左侧，露出尾巴和鳍。她的服装包含五个主要可见部分：白色短袖衬衫、海军蓝无袖背心裙、胸前三个金色小蝴蝶结装饰、灰色裙子，以及腰间挂着一个带有细带和搭扣的米色小斜挎包。在头部附近添加两个手绘白色小爱心涂鸦，以体现喜爱之情。背景柔和梦幻，充满淡蓝色的水族馆商店货架和圆润的海洋生物毛绒玩具，带有柔和的散景效果、淡蓝色灯光和温馨的水族馆氛围。采用高质量的日系动漫艺术风格，线条细腻，眼睛光泽感强，采用柔和的赛璐珞阴影，布料褶皱自然，肤色温暖，整体氛围明亮可爱。在左下角添加一个小巧的白色艺术家水印，内容为 @minori_chigusa  無断使用NG。构图保持 2:3 竖版，画面中不要出现额外角色或多余的可读文字，重点突出少女对虎鲸毛绒玩具的喜爱之情。
